_publications._publicationTitle: Testing ATRA and MEK inhibitor PD0325901 effectiveness in a nude mouse model for human MPNST xenografts.

_contextSnippet: 2 × 10⁶, 5 × 10⁶, and 10 × 10⁶ MPNST cells were subcutaneously transplanted...After 8 weeks tumor volumes did not reach 70 mm³
details: After 8 weeks, tumor volumes did not reach 70 mm³ for any cell number tested (2×10⁶, 5×10⁶, and 10×10⁶ MPNST cells)
